items.title: Trump Mobile’s website still says the T1 Phone is ‘American-made’
items.summary: Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. We've reached out, as usual, to ask about the Trump phone's whereabouts. As the phone's supposed launch continues, we noticed…

items.title: Jony Ive’s funky Ferrari
items.summary: Most people will never own, drive, or even sit inside a Ferrari Luce. (If you can, or do… hit us up.) There's still no question that Ferrari's first electric vehicle is one of the most interesting, su…

items.title: This chip startup just raised $135M on a bet that AI’s biggest bottleneck isn’t compute — it’s memory
items.summary: South Korean chip startup Xcena is betting that AI's real bottleneck is not compute, but memory.
